mapper.sql: dormitory_id, name, region, postal_code, address, layout_type, gender_type, nearest_station_1, nearest_station_2, nearest_station_3, remarks, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitory (dormitory_id, name, region, postal_code, address, layout_type, gender_type, nearest_station_1, nearest_station_2, nearest_station_3, remarks, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{dormitoryId}, #{name}, #{region}, #{postalCode}, #{address}, #{layoutType}, #{genderType}, #{nearestStation1}, #{nearestStation2}, #{nearestStation3}, #{remarks}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitory SET name = #{name}, region = #{region}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address = #{address}, layout_type = #{layoutType}, gender_type = #{genderType}, nearest_station_1 = #{nearestStation1}, nearest_station_2 = #{nearestStation2}, nearest_station_3 = #{nearestStation3}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE dormitory SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM dormitory WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
